brief_notes: Outstanding algorithmic paper with rigorous benchmarking across multiple scales (small to 1000+ clones), real cancer datasets (14 B-ALL patients, 2 CRC), and detailed complexity analysis. Tables are exceptionally well-designed with speedup breakdowns by problem size, per-patient sum-condition violations, and head-to-head F1 comparisons. The warm-start contribution is well-quantified. Theoretical results (Theorem 1, Corollary 1) are clearly stated. Limitations are honest about ISA assumption and lack of uncertainty estimates.
